description_long: This object is a public upright piano with a wooden frame and a slightly curved bench, designed for outdoor urban environments. The back panel features two colorful posters, suggesting it is placed in a community or park setting for public use. The seat is made of slatted wood, and the armrests and support brackets are metallic, giving it a sturdy appearance. The piano's back panel is dark brown, contrasting with the lighter wood of the seat. No visible keyboard or pedals are present, and the lid appears to be missing or not present. The overall structure is robust, with weathered textures indicating exposure to outdoor elements.
description: A public upright piano with a wooden frame, slatted bench, and two posters on the back panel, designed for outdoor urban use. The piano has metallic armrests and a weathered appearance.
description_view_0: Rear angled view showing the back panel with posters and the curved shape of the bench.
description_view_1: Front angled view highlighting the slatted wooden seat, metallic armrests, and posters on the back panel.
description_view_2: Direct front view showing the full width of the seat, both posters, and the structure of the armrests.
description_view_3: Side-rear view emphasizing the curvature of the bench and the depth of the back panel.
attribute_keyboard_layout: No visible keyboard; the keyboard area is obscured or missing.
